title: Synapse Model Card Extension Component
description: Composable Synapse-specific flat schema component for risks and model use conditions. The properties are flat rather than nested for Synapse compatibility.

privacy_risk.description: Privacy-related concerns such as memorization, leakage, re-identification, or sensitive data exposure.

other_risk.description: Other relevant risks such as fairness, safety, misuse, security, or operational concerns.

mitigations.description: Known mitigations, safeguards, or recommended controls.

model_use_conditions.description: List of model use conditions, intended to capture Data Use Ontology style labels or equivalent policy labels.

examples.privacy_risk: Low residual risk of membership inference on rare records.
examples.other_risk: Performance may degrade on out-of-distribution cohorts.
examples.mitigations: Access is restricted and outputs should be reviewed before downstream use.
